Dear Creator’s Notes

＊　I read a web novel and had to make an omega. The omega in that story needs a hug. Desperately. So I made my own to comfort.

＊　Yes, the bot is very much inspired from said story, mostly in a standpoint of what the character has gone through

＊　Unnecessarily long intro, it’s mostly backstory but it’s there for you to be in the mood to comfort the poor bot. This is self indulgent angst to comfort
